form.label: Error Analysis
form.description: Investigate and troubleshoot GenAI errors - error trends, root cause analysis, and resolution tracking

search.query: `genai_traces_index` is_error=1 | stats count by span_type | sort - count
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1 GenAI_Span.span_type=$span_type_filter$

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as total_requests sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) as error_count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces | eval error_rate=round((error_count/total_requests)*100,2) | fields error_rate
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true dc(GenAI_Span.span_type) as types from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1
| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true dc(GenAI_Span.workflow_name) as workflows from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1 by GenAI_Span.span_type | rename GenAI_Span.span_type as span_type | sort - count | head 10

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1 by GenAI_Span.model_name | rename GenAI_Span.model_name as model_name | sort - count | head 10

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1 by GenAI_Span.workflow_name | rename GenAI_Span.workflow_name as workflow_name | sort - count | head 10

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1 GenAI_Span.span_type=$span_type_filter$ by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h count as Errors

| tstats prestats=t summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) from datamodel=GenAI_Traces by _time span=1h | timechart span=1h count as total sum(GenAI_Span.is_error) as errors | eval error_rate = round((errors/total)*100, 2) | fields _time, error_rate

| tstats summariesonly=false allow_old_summaries=true count as occurrences latest(_time) as last_seen values(GenAI_Span.workflow_name) as workflows values(GenAI_Span.model_name) as models from datamodel=GenAI_Traces where GenAI_Span.is_error=1 GenAI_Span.span_type=$span_type_filter$ by GenAI_Span.span_type GenAI_Span.error_message | rename GenAI_Span.* as * | sort - occurrences | eval last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | table span_type, error_message, occurrences, last_seen, workflows, models | rename span_type as "Error Type", error_message as "Error Message", occurrences as "Count", last_seen as "Last Seen", workflows as "Affected Workflows", models as "Affected Models"

`genai_traces_index` is_error=1 span_type=$span_type_filter$ | head 100 | table _time, trace_id, span_type, workflow_name, model_name, span_type, error_message, duration_ms | sort - _time | rename _time as "Time", trace_id as "Trace ID", span_type as "Span Type", workflow_name as "Workflow", model_name as "Model", span_type as "Error Type", error_message as "Error Message", duration_ms as "Duration (ms)"
